---
title: Composable Stack
summary: A modular architecture that scales from prototypes to production without rewrites.
eyebrow: Flexibility
order: 3
---

Our composable stack is designed to grow with your project. Start with individual modules for specific functionalities, and seamlessly integrate them into a cohesive system as your needs evolve. This modular approach allows you to iterate quickly during the prototyping phase, while providing a clear path to scale up to production without the need for costly rewrites. Whether you're building a simple audio tool or a complex media platform, our composable stack gives you the flexibility to adapt and expand your project with confidence.
